tutorial.teacher_create_desc: Here you can create new Posts, Courses and Tests — your main teaching tools on the platform.
tutorial.teacher_notif_desc: Here you will see new students, reviews, complaints, and other important platform events.
tutorial.student_nav_desc: This is your main navigation menu. From here you can access all sections of the platform.
tutorial.student_catalog_desc: Browse the course catalog and find the right teacher for you. Thousands of courses and lessons are waiting!
tutorial.student_tools_desc: Take a break with educational games or use the Pomodoro timer to study productively.
tutorial.student_notif_desc: Stay up to date — here you will see new lessons, messages and platform news.
tutorial.student_posts_desc: Your teachers publish useful articles, tips and learning materials here.
tutorial.guest_posts_desc: Here you can read educational posts from teachers on the platform.
tutorial.guest_login_desc: Register or log in to access courses, lessons, video calls with teachers and much more!
tutorial.tDash_videoRoom_desc: Create a video call room for one-on-one or group lessons. Share the link with students — they can join directly from their browser.
tutorial.tDash_history_desc: Access your call transcripts, saved bookmarks, detailed statistics, and your calendar with scheduled lessons.
tutorial.tDash_promo_desc: Enter a promo code here to unlock VIP access or a discount. VIP teachers can create paid courses and access advanced analytics.
tutorial.tDash_telegram_desc: Connect Telegram to receive instant notifications about new students, scheduled lessons, and important platform events right in your messenger.
tutorial.tDash_students_desc: Here you can see all your students, search by name or subject, and click on any student to see their progress, errors, and schedule a lesson.
tutorial.tDash_contentTabs_desc: Switch between your content: All, Courses, Posts, Services, and Tests. Here you can manage everything you've published.
tutorial.tDash_contentGrid_desc: All your published materials are here — Courses, Posts (articles), Services (paid lessons), and Tests. Each card has quick edit and delete actions.
tutorial.crm_navbar_desc: Drag any block from here onto the canvas to add it to your course. Each block type serves a different purpose.
tutorial.crm_infoText_desc: Add formatted text: lesson theory, explanations, instructions. Supports rich text formatting.
tutorial.crm_media_desc: Embed images and videos. Visual content makes lessons more engaging and easier to understand.
tutorial.crm_audio_desc: Add audio recordings, pronunciations, or voice explanations for your students to listen to.
tutorial.crm_activeTest_desc: Embed a full interactive test directly inside a lesson node. Students complete it without leaving the course.
tutorial.crm_testLink_desc: Link to one of your existing standalone tests. Great for end-of-module assessments.
tutorial.crm_posts_desc: Reference one of your published articles or posts. Add supplementary reading material to lessons.
tutorial.crm_files_desc: Let students download study materials: worksheets, PDFs, notes, or any file they need for the lesson.
tutorial.crm_comment_desc: Add a space for student questions, reviews, and comments on this specific lesson node.
tutorial.crm_divider_desc: Split the course into sections or modules. Use it to separate different topics or difficulty levels.
tutorial.crm_drag_desc: Drag any block from the left panel and drop it onto the canvas. The tutorial will continue automatically.
tutorial.crm_panel_desc: Auto-Layout arranges nodes automatically. Paywall mode lets you mark sections as paid. Save stores the course.
tutorial.crm_canvas_desc: Connect blocks with arrows to define the lesson order and flow. Each arrow is a transition from one step to the next.
tutorial.ct_header_desc: Give your test a clear name. Use "Import from PDF" to automatically generate questions from a document.
tutorial.ct_form_desc: The name appears in the catalog. Description helps students understand the topic. Category makes your test easier to find.
tutorial.ct_menu_desc: Drag any question block onto the canvas to add it to your test. Each block type creates a different kind of question.
tutorial.ct_choose_desc: Classic single or multiple correct answer question. Best for knowledge checks and facts.
tutorial.ct_free_desc: Student types their own answer. Great for open-ended questions and written explanations. AI can auto-check it.
tutorial.ct_fill_desc: Text with gaps that students must fill in. Perfect for vocabulary, grammar, and recall exercises.
tutorial.ct_match_desc: Connect left and right items. Ideal for definitions, translations, and cause-effect relationships.
tutorial.ct_sequence_desc: Drag items into the correct sequence. Great for timelines, algorithms, and step-by-step processes.
tutorial.ct_highlight_desc: Student clicks to highlight the correct words in a passage. Excellent for reading comprehension.
tutorial.ct_scramble_desc: Rearrange scrambled letters or words to form the correct answer. Good for spelling and sentence construction.
tutorial.ct_dialogue_desc: Sort dialogue lines into the correct order. Perfect for language learning and conversational practice.
tutorial.ct_infoText_desc: Add explanatory text, theory, or instructions between questions. Helps structure the test into logical sections.
tutorial.ct_infoMedia_desc: Embed an image or video as context for the following questions. Great for listening or visual comprehension tasks.
tutorial.ct_infoAudio_desc: Add an audio clip. Students listen and answer related questions — ideal for language listening exercises.
tutorial.ct_drag_desc: Drag any question block from the right panel to the canvas. The tutorial will continue automatically.
tutorial.ct_save_desc: When your test is ready, click Save. It will be available in your course, your profile, and the test catalog.

TestPlayer.msgExcellent: Outstanding result! You've mastered this topic.
TestPlayer.msgGood: Good job! A couple of points are worth reviewing.
TestPlayer.msgSatisfactory: Not bad, but it's worth reading the material once more.
TestPlayer.msgNeedsWork: Take the test again — it will help you remember the material better.
TestPlayer.labelDialogue: Arrange the dialogue in the correct order

roadmapTutorial.title: How to take the course
roadmapTutorial.hint1Desc: Double-click a node to mark it complete. All prior steps are marked automatically.
roadmapTutorial.hint2Desc: Double-click a completed node to remove the mark.
roadmapTutorial.hint3Desc: Click and drag to pan. Scroll wheel to zoom.

LandingPage.hero_today: Today: 3 lessons and a call at 18:00.
LandingPage.hero_desc: a platform built to save time and simplify learning. Automatic error saving, many tools in one place, taking and creating courses, posts and much more.
LandingPage.video_desc1: While the session is running, the platform transcribes speech and builds a structured summary — with key points, tasks and timecodes. No manual note-taking needed.
LandingPage.video_hl: AI remembers student mistakes and saves them directly to their profile.
LandingPage.video_desc2: This saves the tutor time writing up the lesson and gives instant visibility into progress and weak spots.
LandingPage.video_c1: Summary ready right after the call
LandingPage.course_desc1: The visual editor turns scattered material — files, texts, tests — into a clear map: students can see how topics connect.
LandingPage.course_hl: A finished course graph helps teachers show their style and approach before lessons begin.
LandingPage.course_desc2: Students explore the material and teaching style in advance, attracting new learners. Courses can also be published in a paid format in the future.
LandingPage.cal_desc1: Lessons, calls and deadlines — all on one week view. Colour labels by type, reminders and one-click join.
LandingPage.cal_desc2: Fewer reschedules and forgotten lessons — more steady income.
LandingPage.f1_desc: AI analyses student work and saves errors to their profile.
LandingPage.f2_desc: Upload a file and get all questions in digital format with answers — share with your students.
LandingPage.f3_desc: Connect your card — sell courses and posts and get paid automatically.
LandingPage.pdf_desc: Upload a file with questions and answers — the service detects the structure and builds an interactive test: multiple choice, matching, free input. Students take it online, results are calculated automatically.
LandingPage.vid_sub1: Let's continue — today we cover closures in JavaScript.
LandingPage.vid_sub2: What's the difference between a closure and scope?
LandingPage.vid_sub3: Scope defines the rules, a closure captures variables inside a function.
LandingPage.vid_sub4: Can you show an example with a counter function?
LandingPage.vid_sub6: Got it! Each call to make creates a new independent counter.
LandingPage.vid_tr1: Today we cover closures in JavaScript — one of the key topics for understanding React.
LandingPage.vid_tr2: A closure is a function that remembers variables from its scope even after the outer function has returned.
LandingPage.vid_tr3: How is that different from regular scope?
LandingPage.vid_tr4: Scope defines visibility rules. A closure captures variables and keeps them alive inside a function.
LandingPage.vid_tr5: Can you show an example with a counter? I saw something like this in React hooks.
LandingPage.vid_tr6: const makeCounter = () => { let n = 0; return () => ++n }. Each call to makeCounter creates a separate counter.
LandingPage.vid_tr7: So n lives independently in each closure and doesn't overlap!
LandingPage.vid_tr8: Exactly. Task: write a function that creates a counter with a custom step. Deadline — next lesson.

CourseFlow.entry_desc: Course start — all blocks connect from here
CourseFlow.post_desc: Link to post in the feed
CourseFlow.n_text_preview: What is JSX, components and props...

PdfInfoPage.hero_h1: From PDF — to a ready test.
PdfInfoPage.hero_desc: Upload a PDF with questions and answers — get a ready test on your site. Multiple choice, matching pairs, text input — we detect the structure automatically.
PdfInfoPage.drop_sub: or click to choose a file
PdfInfoPage.drop_guest: No registration: up to 5 questions free.
PdfInfoPage.drop_fmt_vip: PDF · DOCX · TXT · RTF · UP TO 50 MB · VIP: all formats
PdfInfoPage.proc_guest: Processing without sign-in: up to 5 questions from the first page.
PdfInfoPage.done_guest: Free preview: {n} questions from one page.
PdfInfoPage.done_register_sfx: — to process the full document, save and share the test.
PdfInfoPage.vip_p1c: is available to VIP users only.
PdfInfoPage.vip_p2: PDF works for everyone. Activate VIP — upload any format, get up to 20 questions at a time.
PdfInfoPage.how_h2: Three steps from file to test
PdfInfoPage.how_desc: No manual question entry. Upload takes seconds, recognition — about a minute per document.
PdfInfoPage.how_s1d: Drop a file with questions and answers. Exams, homework, test papers — in any order.
PdfInfoPage.how_s2d: We parse text, find questions and options, identify task types and correct answers.
PdfInfoPage.how_s3d: You get an interactive test by link. Students take it online, results calculated automatically.
PdfInfoPage.qt_desc: We recognize and build all major types. Click — the cards below are interactive.
PdfInfoPage.rs_h2: This is what the finished test looks like
PdfInfoPage.rs_desc: Clean quiz interface: progress bar, question navigation, instant checking.
PdfInfoPage.rs_q: Which data structure works on the LIFO principle?
PdfInfoPage.st_h2: From upload — to a test with images
PdfInfoPage.st_desc: The upload arrow transforms into processing, then a document with text and photos, and finally an interactive test. Watch the transformation on the right.
PdfInfoPage.ep_h2: Errors go into the student's profile automatically
PdfInfoPage.ep_desc: AI remembers every mistake and groups them by topic. The tutor doesn't need to hunt for weak spots manually — they see them right away.
PdfInfoPage.ep_b1d: errors go to the profile after each test — no manual notebook
PdfInfoPage.ep_b2d: by topic and task type: you see where the systematic gap is
PdfInfoPage.ep_b3d: the lesson starts with the student's weakest point
PdfInfoPage.faq1_a: PDF and DOCX up to 50 MB. A document can contain multiple variants and mixed question types — we sort them out.
PdfInfoPage.faq2_q: Do I need to mark up questions manually?
PdfInfoPage.faq2_a: No. The service finds phrasings, answer choices and task types on its own. Correct answers in the file are pulled too.
PdfInfoPage.faq3_q: Does it recognize formulas and images?
PdfInfoPage.faq3_a: Text formulas and tables — yes. Pictures and diagrams are attached to the question, adjustable in the editor before publishing.
PdfInfoPage.faq4_q: Can I edit the test after import?
PdfInfoPage.faq4_a: Yes. An editor opens after recognition: edit phrasing, options, scores and task type before sharing the link.
PdfInfoPage.faq5_q: How do students take the test?
PdfInfoPage.faq5_a: Via link — no installation or registration. Results and per-question stats are collected in your dashboard automatically.
PdfInfoPage.faq6_a: After the test AI adds errors to the student profile and groups them by topic and task type. The tutor sees weak spots immediately.
PdfInfoPage.faq7_a: Files are processed and stored in your account, accessible only via your links. Uploaded PDFs can be deleted at any time.
PdfInfoPage.seo_h2: Digital tests from PDF — for any subject and study format
PdfInfoPage.seo_p1b: turns a regular PDF with questions and answers into an interactive test. Upload an exam variant, school quiz, homework or question set — the service detects document structure and builds a ready test students take online.
PdfInfoPage.seo_p2: All major task types are supported: single or multiple choice, matching pairs, text input, ordering and true/false. Results are calculated automatically.
PdfInfoPage.seo_p3a: school teachers, tutors and learning centers
PdfInfoPage.seo_p3b: preparing students for exams. One uploaded file — a ready online trainer: share via link, embed in a course, or run as a quiz in class.
PdfInfoPage.seo_p4: Before publishing, any test opens in an editor — fix phrasing, scores and task type, add images and a timer.
PdfInfoPage.cta_h2b: the test will be ready by the break.
PdfInfoPage.cta_desc: Free for the first three tests. No card, no installation.
PdfInfoPage.footer_tagline: PDF to interactive tests for teachers, tutors and learning centers.

Pomodoro.tip1_desc: Work without distractions for one Pomodoro
Pomodoro.tip2_desc: A short rest after each session
Pomodoro.tip4_desc: Track your progress with the session dots

Games.pacman_desc: Collect dots, run from ghosts and eat them after power pellets.

PrivacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPage.section1p1: This Privacy Policy describes how the GoodWorker platform collects, uses, and protects the personal data of users when they use our service.
PrivacyPage.section1p2: By using the platform, you agree to the terms of this Policy. If you do not agree with its provisions, please discontinue using the service.
PrivacyPage.section2item1: Registration data: name, email address, phone number, password (stored in encrypted form).
PrivacyPage.section2item2: Profile data: profile photo, biography, specialization (for tutors), work experience documents, passport scan (if voluntarily provided).
PrivacyPage.section2item3: Activity data: lesson records, video call transcriptions, reviews, bookmarks, test results.
PrivacyPage.section2item4: Technical data: IP address, browser type, session data, login time.
PrivacyPage.section2item5: Payment data: subscription plan transactions — payment details are processed by a payment provider and are not stored on our servers.
PrivacyPage.section3item1: Providing platform functionality: lesson booking, video calls, material sharing.
PrivacyPage.section3item2: Verifying tutor identity and confirming their qualifications.
PrivacyPage.section3item3: Sending notifications related to platform operations.
PrivacyPage.section3item4: Improving service quality and combating fraud.
PrivacyPage.section3item5: Compliance with the legislation of the Russian Federation.
PrivacyPage.section4p1: We do not sell or transfer your personal data to third parties, except in the following cases:
PrivacyPage.section4item1: Payment processing services (to the extent necessary for processing transactions).
PrivacyPage.section4item2: Video communication services (LiveKit) — for organizing online lessons.
PrivacyPage.section4item3: Requirements of government authorities in cases provided for by law.
PrivacyPage.section5p1: Your data is stored on secure servers. Passwords are stored in encrypted form using cryptographic hash functions. Access to personal data is restricted and granted only to authorized personnel.
PrivacyPage.section5p2: We apply technical and organizational measures to protect data from unauthorized access, modification, disclosure, or destruction.
PrivacyPage.section6p1: We retain your data for the entire period of your use of the platform. After account deletion, personal data is deleted within 30 days, except for data that we are required to retain by law.
PrivacyPage.section7p1: In accordance with Federal Law No. 152-FZ "On Personal Data", you have the right to:
PrivacyPage.section7item1: Obtain information about the composition and purposes of processing your personal data.
PrivacyPage.section7item3: Request deletion of data (withdraw consent to processing).
PrivacyPage.section7item4: Contact Roskomnadzor in case of violation of your rights.
PrivacyPage.section7p2: To exercise your rights, please contact us using the contact details provided below.
PrivacyPage.section8p1: The platform uses cookies to maintain the authorization session and improve service performance. You may disable cookies in your browser settings, however this may affect platform functionality.
PrivacyPage.section9p1: We reserve the right to make changes to this Policy. The current version is always available on this page. In case of significant changes, we will notify users through the platform.
PrivacyPage.section10p1: For questions related to personal data processing, you can contact us:
PrivacyPage.section10item1: Through the <feedbackLink>Feedback</feedbackLink> section on the platform.

TermsPage.title: Terms of Service
TermsPage.section1p1: By using GoodWorker, you confirm that you have read and agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any provisions, please stop using the platform.
TermsPage.section2p1: GoodWorker is an educational platform that connects students with tutors. The platform provides tools for:
TermsPage.section2item2: Conducting online classes via video conferencing.
TermsPage.section2item3: Working with educational materials: tests, roadmaps, posts.
TermsPage.section3p1: To use the platform, you must create an account. You agree to:
TermsPage.section3item2: Not share your login credentials with third parties.
TermsPage.section3item3: Notify us of unauthorized access to your account.
TermsPage.section3item4: Be at least 14 years old (users under 18 must have parental or legal guardian consent).
TermsPage.section4p1: When using the platform, you are prohibited from:
TermsPage.section4item1: Posting illegal, offensive, or misleading content.
TermsPage.section4item3: Using the platform for commercial purposes without appropriate permission.
TermsPage.section4item4: Attempting to gain unauthorized access to platform systems.
TermsPage.section4item5: Creating fake accounts or impersonating others.
TermsPage.section5p1: Tutors registered on the platform are responsible for:
TermsPage.section5item1: The accuracy of information about their qualifications and experience.
TermsPage.section5item2: The quality of educational services provided.
TermsPage.section5p2: GoodWorker acts as an intermediary and is not responsible for the quality of specific sessions.
TermsPage.section6p1: The platform provides basic access for free. Additional features (VIP status) are available on a paid basis. The cost and terms of tariff plans are specified in the relevant section of the platform.
TermsPage.section6p2: Payment for sessions is made directly between the student and tutor in accordance with the terms of the specific service.
TermsPage.section7p1: By publishing materials on the platform (posts, comments, roadmaps, tests), you grant GoodWorker a non-exclusive license to use them for the purpose of operating the service.
TermsPage.section7p2: You retain all rights to your materials and are responsible for their legality.
TermsPage.section8item2: The quality of educational services provided by tutors.
TermsPage.section8item3: Damages arising from the use of the platform.
TermsPage.section9p1: The GoodWorker platform, its design, logo, and source code are protected by copyright. Reproduction or distribution without permission is prohibited.
TermsPage.section10p1: We reserve the right to suspend or delete a user's account in case of violation of these Terms without prior notice.
TermsPage.section11p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Russian Federation. Disputes shall be resolved in court at the location of the platform.
TermsPage.section12p1: We reserve the right to modify these Terms. Continued use of the platform after changes are published constitutes your acceptance of the new version.
TermsPage.section13p1: For questions regarding the terms of use:
TermsPage.section13item2: Also check out our Privacy Policy.
